extortion.description: Prismier is a leading vertically-integrated Mechanical Contract Manufacturer (MCM). Service offerings include Design & Engineering, Rapid Prototype thru Production of Sheet Metal Fabrication & Stamping, Plastic Injection Molding, CNC Machining, Die Casting, and Assembly.We are ready to upload 42gb of corporate documents such as: detailed personal information of employees (passports, driver licenses, addresses, phones, emails and so on), customer information, projects, contracts and agreements, numerous NDAs, etc.
